mortar.task: 2026-06-11-taco-dashboard-v2-kc-fixes — DONE (AC-5): v2 dashboard read EMPTY despite 9 imported invoices. Root cause = applyScope serialized window bounds with .toISOString() (UTC) but created_at is `timestamp without time zone` storing LOCAL wall-clock → `< to` sat 7h in past, dropped all of today's rows. Fix: toLocalNaive() bounds (local frame) + repoint area-name join inv.area→raw regions (Grout 837b85bd consolidation, mirrors decorateListItems). Verified live :5013 vs DB: recap 9/60/461 (taco454/comp7), trending real SKUs, ai-insight live Sonnet over real rollups, ?area= + ?period= all non-empty. tsc+eslint clean. Dashboard-report contract handed to Mosaic for FE. PRIOR (BE): AC-2 Antrian filter ?filter=pending|selesai|semua on GET /api/v2/invoices (3/6/9=DB); AC-3 Area CRUD on public.regions via NEW /api/v2/regions (18 areas read; create/update/soft-delete(active=false)/reactivate verified vs DB); AC-1+AC-4 exposed needs_review_count on invoice detail+list. AC-1 root cause = FE re-derivation (lineDisplay uses matched_sku_id, ignores BE needs_review); BE status is spec-correct (90a9c95d has 2 taco_low_verify lines that DO need review). Flipping it to not-perlu-review = locked low_verify->review routing change = Grout spine → FLAGGED to KC, not patched. tsc+eslint clean, verified live :5013.
